results.label: Agent System
results.rationale: Core agent abstraction layer: registry, shared interface/types, and all four agent implementations (planner, executor, spec, commit).

results.label: Provider System
results.rationale: Provider abstraction layer: registry, shared interface, failover pool, error classification, binary detection, and progress reporting.

results.label: Provider Implementations
results.rationale: Concrete provider implementations for OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, Claude, and Codex, all conforming to the shared ProviderInstance interface.

results.label: Datasource System
results.rationale: Datasource abstraction layer: registry, unified interface, and implementations for GitHub Issues, Azure DevOps work items, and local markdown files.

results.label: CLI & Configuration
results.rationale: CLI entry point, persistent configuration management, interactive configuration wizard, and OAuth/app constants.

results.label: Orchestrator & Pipelines
results.rationale: Central coordinator (runner) and the three execution pipelines (dispatch, spec generation, fix-tests) plus shared datasource helpers.

results.label: Spec Generation
results.rationale: End-to-end spec generation flow: validation/extraction utilities, the spec agent, and the spec pipeline that ties them together.

results.label: Dispatch Pipeline
results.rationale: Core dispatch execution flow: task dispatching, planner-driven planning, commit message generation, and git worktree isolation.

results.label: MCP Server
results.rationale: MCP server infrastructure: entry point, HTTP/stdio transport setup, child-process worker, SQLite database layer, and state manager.

results.label: MCP Tools
results.rationale: MCP tool registrations exposed to clients: dispatch, spec generation, monitoring, recovery/retry, config management, and the shared fork-run helper.

results.label: Core Helpers & Utilities
results.rationale: Cross-cutting utility modules: barrel export, structured logger, retry/timeout wrappers, sliding-window concurrency, and runtime environment detection.

results.label: Git, State & Auth Helpers
results.rationale: Infrastructure helpers for OAuth device-flow auth, git worktree lifecycle, gitignore management, run-state persistence, and startup prerequisite checks.

results.label: Terminal UI
results.rationale: Real-time terminal dashboard renderer and its formatting/slugify dependencies used for display and branch name generation.

results.label: Test Runner & Fix-Tests
results.rationale: Standalone test detection/execution module and the AI-assisted fix-tests pipeline that uses it to find and repair broken tests.

results.label: Task Parsing & Dispatching
results.rationale: Task file parsing (markdown checkbox extraction), per-task dispatch with session isolation, and the shared result types that connect them.

results.label: Tests: Agents
results.rationale: Unit tests for all agent implementations: planner, spec agent, commit agent, and spec generation utilities.

results.label: Tests: Providers
results.rationale: Unit tests for each provider implementation, binary detection, and progress reporting.

results.label: Tests: Datasources
results.rationale: Unit tests for datasource implementations, URL parsing, and shared datasource helper functions.

results.label: Tests: Orchestrator & Pipelines
results.rationale: Tests covering the orchestrator runner, dispatch pipeline, spec pipeline, respec routing, and fix-tests pipeline.

results.label: Tests: CLI & Configuration
results.rationale: Tests for CLI argument parsing, CLI config resolution, persistent config I/O, and the interactive configuration wizard.

results.label: Tests: Helpers & Utilities
results.rationale: Tests for cross-cutting helper modules: concurrency, environment detection, prerequisites, worktree management, error types, and authentication.

results.label: Tests: MCP Server & State
results.rationale: Tests for MCP tool handlers, SQLite database layer, state manager CRUD operations, and run-state persistence.

results.label: Tests: Integration & E2E
results.rationale: Integration-level tests: full dispatch flow, file-logger integration with pipelines, task dispatcher behavior, and git operations across datasources.

results.label: Test Fixtures & Mocks
results.rationale: Shared test fixtures, SDK mock stubs, and tests for peripheral modules (TUI renderer, test runner) that don't fit other groups.

results.label: MCP Tool Shared Utilities
results.rationale: Shared internal utilities for MCP tools: child process forking, config resolution for MCP context, and fix-tests tool registration.

results.label: Error Handling & Guards
results.rationale: Cross-cutting error types, type guards, branch name validation, and provider error classification used throughout the codebase.

results.label: File Logging
results.rationale: Logging infrastructure: structured console logger, per-run file logging with AsyncLocalStorage, cleanup registry, and user confirmation prompts.
